verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holy, holy are You, lord Who sits upon the throne Worthy, worthy are You, lord Who was who is and is to come

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are amazing God There is none like You You are amazing God Your power is so true You are amazing God There is none like You You are amazing God The amazing God I know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The elders and angels They bow before you You're the Lord of all creation You redeemed us by your blood Tour pow'r is amazing Your grace is amazing Your love is amazing And we stand amazed
